refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imdiffusefilt(image) out = imdiffusefilt(image, iterations, conductance, step)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Applies repeated local smoothing while reducing the update near strong intensity differences. The current implementation is a Scilab macro approximation of anisotropic diffusion and returns double values in the range 0 to 1.

refsection.title: Examples
